text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I finish escorting <chrname> back to
the dorms after training when all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Murmur... Murmur...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Just a smidgeon of info will do! Please allow us to
corroborate this story!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm very sorry, but no! You're inconveniencing
our students, so I'd appreciate it if you would
leave the area!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer?! Oh no, you mustn't make an
appearance!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't that the trainer in question?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Would you happen to be Trainer
<username>?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Are the rumors true?! Are you forcing your trainee
to undergo brutal training?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
They say you make her run late into the night
every day, or make her sit atop a stone for three
days straight, or make her do laps while
handstand walking.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
But there's already been a news story published
about it!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This whole time, I've been trying to tell you all
that that article is nothing but libel!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
So you claim that it's all untrue? This matter
concerns the very reputation of Tracen Academy
itself!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Restraint! I call for restraint!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: First, allow me to reject those claims! Categorically! Nobody at this academy would ever subject our beloved students to such suffering!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore! The academy will make an official
declaration regarding this matter in due course!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
All members of the media, I beseech you! Please
be patient for the time being!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. But next time you must grant us an
interview.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, Director Akikawa's words manage to
convince the openly discontent reporters to
leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We later hold a meeting in the director's office
regarding the issue. According to Reporter
Otonashi...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...Essentially, our focus on gaining the
cooperation of as many media outlets as possible
caused our quality control to lag behind.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And now, owing to that fabricated article making
the rounds, Trainer
<username>'s reputation has
been cast into doubt.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I'm terribly sorry!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Forgiveness! It is not your responsibility alone,
Miss Otonashi!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's right. The real culprit is the individual who
wrote that strange article in the first place!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! It won't be easy to rein matters in again,
given how far the situation has escalated.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Once a misunderstanding gets out there, there's
almost no way to quash it for good...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. But from the academy's perspective, it's
imperative that we ensure the safety of our
students!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, it may be best to temporarily
suspend the media's access to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Please wait a moment!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: There are no excuses for this incident. I allowed things to get out of hand!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But we simply can't make the Twinkle Star Climax
happen without your cooperation!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
We don't intend to cut ties with the event
completely, of course! But we must scale down
news coverage until public sentiment settles
down.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Until things settle down? You mean when the
event's been completely forgotten by everyone?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, the reporter and media outlet
responsible for that libelous article will no longer
have any involvement with the races!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'm aware that this is a selfish request! But would
you please allow news coverage to continue as
normal?
choice_data_list: Why are you so adamant about this?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I don't want this incident to be a damper on the
hype surrounding the Twinkle Star Climax.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: This race is for all Umamusume who possess the skills worthy of being dubbed the "greatest."

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
A chance for all those talented runners who, by
some cruel twist of fate, let that highest honor
slip by to claim what is rightfully theirs!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Their moment of victory deserves to be glorious! I want the atmosphere to be positively intoxicating!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'll take responsibility for this situation and do
everything in my power to get it under control. So
please!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Misgivings! How exactly do you intend to resolve
the situation, Miss Otonashi?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Your passion is evident. However! As director of
this academy, I am not in a position to make
concessions on the grounds of passion alone!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: ...Please allow me to conduct a report.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A report? Hmm, perplexing... We're planning to
limit all news coverage, and you're asking to write
a report?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It will be called "Up Close and Personal with
Trainer <username>"!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Yes! By following you every day, I'll be able to
show the world your amazing training methods.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
My report will prove that any claims of you
conducting reckless training sessions are
completely unfounded!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And it could double as a publicity piece! You've
really thought this through... I am all for it!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I suppose if it's her conducting the report, then it
shouldn't place too much of a burden on you.
choice_data_list:
That's true... She is very knowledgeable, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But aren't you awfully busy preparing for the
event, Reporter Otonashi?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
What happens if you need to pull out before your
report's finished, and someone else has to replace
you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'll be handling this entire report
myself, no matter what. Even if I break every
bone in my body and have to crawl on my
stomach!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: This will be my way of taking responsibility!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I do hope you'll go to the hospital if that comes
to pass... What do you think, Director?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Naturally, as head of Tracen Academy, I
will bear responsibility for the outcome...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Query! I'd like to hear your opinion, Trainer
<username>.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I am of the firm belief that the final decision
should rest with you, <chrname>'s
partner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm suddenly at a loss for words. A stable training
environment or public support—which would be
best for <chrname>'s development?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that Reporter Otonashi's knowledge will
be a powerful asset. But can I really trust her?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Please... Allow me to chase my dream for a little
while longer!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Good morning! Today marks the beginning of my
coverage on you. I appreciate your cooperation!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I'm actually a little surprised that
you gave the okay.
choice_data_list:
I don't want to stand in the way of anyone's
dream.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Hm? Dream, you say?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: R-right! I'll do my best not to get in your way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm still not sure what Reporter Otonashi's dream
is, but if I were to deny her the opportunity to
pursue it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'd also be turning my back on the
dream that <chrname> and I vowed to
realize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins Reporter Otonashi's "up close and
personal" coverage!
